calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Title To Trust Assests (Probate Code Section 850(A)(3)(B))
Off Calendar Sep-11-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ross Madden for John Winch.

The Court noted that this is a petition to determine trust asset regarding a real property/time share in San Francisco, that there is no general assignment, that it is not listed on schedule A of the trust and questions why they are here if the Nevada Court has already determined this. Mr. Madden stated that the Nevada order deems it as trust property, that they are here because they are not on title here and that they have already to record title. The Court questions whether they recorded the Nevada order. The Petition for Order Determining Title to Trust Assets is off calendar on the grounds that this issue has already been decided by another Court.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Order Determining Title To Trust Assests (Probate Code Section 850(A)(3)(B))
Off Calendar Jul-31-2019 Continued To Sep-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
